# Pro Home Media

> South Florida's premier real estate photography and video production company. Based in Cape Coral, FL. Founded by Luis Novoa.

Pro Home Media provides professional real estate media services for real estate agents and brokers across South Florida.

Coverage hierarchy:
1. PRIMARY: Miami (Miami-Dade County) + Broward County (Fort Lauderdale, Hollywood, Pembroke Pines, Coral Springs, Weston, Miramar)
2. SECONDARY: Cape Coral, Fort Myers, Naples (SW Florida / Lee & Collier County)
3. EXTENDED: Orlando and surrounding areas (Kissimmee, Lake Nona, Winter Park) — with advance notice

## Services

- **HDR Real Estate Photography** — Professionally edited, MLS-ready interior and exterior photos
- **Drone Aerial Photography** — FAA-compliant drone photos showcasing property and surroundings
- **Cinematic Drone Video** — Cinematic property flyover videos for listings
- **Social Media Reels** — Short-form vertical video content for Instagram and TikTok
- **Sky Replacement / Twilight** — Day-to-dusk photo editing for stunning twilight exteriors
- **Floor Plans** — 2D basic, 2D enhanced, and 3D premium floor plans via CubiCasa
- **Virtual Staging** — Digitally furnished empty rooms
- **Object Removal** — Clean up unwanted items from photos

## Pricing

- Essential: $199 — 10 HDR photos + 5 drone photos, MLS-ready, 24h delivery
- Standard: $299 — 20 HDR photos + 10 drone photos + sky replacement + floor plan 2D
- Premium: $399 — 30 HDR photos + 15 drone photos + 1 drone video + 1 reel + floor plan 2D enhanced
- Full Media: $499 — 30 HDR photos + 15 drone photos + 2 drone videos + 3 reels + floor plan 3D

Add-ons available: floor plans, virtual staging, extra photos, sky replacement, object removal.

## Coverage Area

Primary: South Florida — Cape Coral, Fort Myers, Naples, Miami
Extended: Orlando (advance notice required)

## Delivery

24-hour turnaround on all photography packages. Priority scheduling available on Full Media package.
